name: Harry Allen
abstract: Harry Allen (born October 12, 1966) is an American jazz tenor saxophonist born in Washington, D.C. Allen plays mainstream jazz and bossa nova.

interviews.title: Harry Allen interviewed by Monk Rowe, Chautauqua, New York, September 13, 1997

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Dave Brubeck Quartet and John Pizzarelli Quartet
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

concerts.label: Carnegie Hall Notables: The Ninth Annual Notable Occasion: Rossano Sportiello and His American Jazz Stars

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Baker
about_quotes.evidence: I’ve heard them on records but I’ve never met Scott. And he plays amazing eclectic things. ... I’d never met Harry either.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Baker interviewed by Monk Rowe, Chautauqua, New York, September 13, 1997

about_quotes.speaker: Bucky Pizzarelli
about_quotes.evidence: I did a thing with Harry Allen and Scott Hamilton... I’m going in I think September I’m going to Germany for a couple of weeks. I’ll come back for a while and then I’m going to Japan with Scott Hamilton and Harry Allen.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bucky Pizzarelli interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, May 23, 2003 [interview 2 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: George Masso
about_quotes.evidence: I’ll be doing some dates in England with Harry Allen. He and I and a rhythm section. ... we’re going to be making a CD while we’re there
about_quotes.doc_title: George Masso interviewed by Monk Rowe, Aspen, Colorado, October 10, 1997

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Temperley
about_quotes.evidence: We have Britt Woodman, Art Baron, Jerry Dodgion and Harry Allen... That’s when I went with the Ellington band, yes.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe Temperley interviewed by Monk Rowe, Aspen, Colorado, October 11, 1997

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Tate
about_quotes.evidence: We recorded it in Belfast in 1996 with Dave McKenna, Butch Miles, Harry Allen and Howard Alden
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Tate interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 17, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Rossano Sportiello
about_quotes.evidence: But you know with players like Harry Allen... We go on stage and until the very last minute Harry doesn’t know what he’s going to play. And then he’ll start something and we play it.
about_quotes.doc_title: Rossano Sportiello interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, October 2, 2015 [interview 1 of 2]
